steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: The words before the blank form an independent clause about a Bose-Einstein condensate. The words after the blank form another independent clause about Lene Hau using a BEC to slow light.

steps.title: Reject weak punctuation
steps.content: A uses only a comma between two independent clauses, B uses and without the needed comma, and D uses no punctuation. A semicolon correctly joins the two clauses. The answer is C.
